2605.29522.title: DeepSurvey: Enhancing Analytical Depth and Citation Reliability in Automated Survey Generation
2605.29522.paper_summary: As scientific literature grows rapidly, automated survey generation has become a key capability for AI scientists and human researchers. However, existing systems suffer from limited analytical depth due to reliance on abstracts and isolated paper processing, and unreliable citations from imprecise retrieval and post-hoc grounding, producing superficial surveys and may mislead researchers. We present DeepSurvey, an agentic system that addresses both. To enhance depth, DeepSurvey extracts structured keynotes from full-text papers, models cross-paper relationships through clustering and comparative analysis, and integrates code-repository analysis to recover implementation-level details. To fortify reliability, it combines citation-graph expansion with hybrid filtering for topic-focussed retrieval, enforces evidence-constrained citation assignment, and deploys multi-granularity agentic refinement to validate citation-claim alignment. Experiments show that DeepSurvey achieves the highest content score (8.644/10) and citation quality (12.3% and 9.3% recall and precision gains over the strongest baseline), generalizes more robustly across domains (0.14 vs 0.22 to 0.69 CS-to-non-CS drop), and is preferred over human-written surveys by domain experts (83.3% overall quality, 100% content depth).
2605.29522.paper_summary_zh: 隨著科學文獻迅速增長，自動化調查生成已成為AI科學家和人類研究者的一項關鍵能力。<lb/>然而，現有系統因依賴摘要和孤立的論文處理而受到分析深度有限的困擾，並且由於不精確的檢索和事後基礎的引用不可靠，產生了表面化的調查，可能會誤導研究者。<lb/>我們提出了DeepSurvey，一個解決這兩個問題的主動系統。<lb/>為了增強深度，DeepSurvey從全文論文中提取結構化的關鍵要點，通過聚類和比較分析建模跨論文關係，並整合代碼庫分析以恢復實施級別的細節。<lb/>為了加強可靠性，它結合了引用圖擴展和混合過濾以進行主題聚焦的檢索，強制執行證據約束的引用分配，並部署多粒度的主動精煉以驗證引用-主張對齊。<lb/>實驗顯示，DeepSurvey實現了最高的內容得分（8.644/10）和引用質量（相較於最強基準，回憶率和精確率分別提高了12.3%和9.3%），在各領域的泛化能力更強（0.14對比0.22至0.69的CS到非CS的下降），並且受到領域專家的偏好，超過人類撰寫的調查（整體質量83.3%，內容深度100%）。
2605.29522.author: Ziyue Yang et.al.
2605.29522.authors: Ziyue Yang, Da Ma, Hanqi Li, Zijian Wang, Tiancheng Huang, Zijian Hu, Chenrun Wang, Yunzhe Zhang, Xiaobao Wu, Kai Yu, Lu Chen
